name: tab-group-nav
title: TabGroupNav
description: Navigation-style tab list (`ds-tab-group-nav`) copied from the original TabGroup behavior for primary/secondary navigation surfaces.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

tabs.description: Tab ids/labels; `{ type: "divider" }` for group breaks. Use `isInactive` on a tab to disable it (25% opacity).
